text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ahhhh, I slept great! I'm ready to bump up the
excitement!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh, wait a sec... Looks like I woke up early.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... There's still time before training. What
should I do?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! I'll use the extra time to do some
maintenance on my mountain bike.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All right—with that decided, I'd better get started
as quick as I can!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Working on my bike is pretty fun! I can't wait to
ride it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I haven't really tinkered with it recently. There's
so many parts I wanna change!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Raaagh! Can't stop now—I'm on fire!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Winning Ticket gets so absorbed in
her mountain bike that she totally forgets about
training.
